title: Item
description: Clover Item resource. Schema derived from the Clover Platform REST API v3 reference.

id.description: Unique identifier of the inventory item.

hidden.description:
Indicates whether the inventory item is hidden on the Register app.
 Default: False

available.description:
Indicates whether the inventory item is available for sale across all channels.
 Default: True

autoManage.description:
Indicates whether the inventory item's availability is automatically or manually managed.
 Values:
 True - Item availability is automatically managed.
 False(default) - Item availability is manually managed.

code.description: Item product code, such as Universal Product Code (UPC) or European Article Number (EAN).

price.description:
Price of the item based on the merchant's local currency and price type, such as fixed, variable, or per unit price.
 For non-VAT merchants who do not pay value-added tax, this field is exclusive of tax.
 For VAT merchants, this field is inclusive of tax.
 Format: Cents

priceType.description: Price type, such as fixed, variable, or per unit price.

defaultTaxRates.description:
Indicates whether or not to use the default tax rate. 
 Default: True

unitName.description: Unit of measurement for the item, such as pound or meter.

cost.description: Cost of the item to a merchant as compared to the price payable by the customer, for example: wholesale versus retail price.

isRevenue.description:
Indicates whether this item is counted as revenue, for example: gift cards and donations are not counted as revenue.
 Default: False

modifiedTime.description: Time when the item was modified.

deletedTime.description: Time when the item was deleted.

priceWithoutVat.description:
Item price without value-added tax (VAT).
 For non-VAT merchants, this field is not used.
 For VAT merchants, this field is the base price of an item.

colorCode.description:
Hex code of the color assigned to the category and its items.
 Format: #fff, #ffffff, or #ffffffff.
